scripts.prepare:wasm: cd ../crates/fork_wasm && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=../../target/wasm-node wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg
scripts.build: npm run prepare:wasm && npm run build:prepared
scripts.test: npm run test:homoclinic-menu && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:full: npm run prepare:wasm && npm run test:wasm:prepared && npm test
scripts.test:coverage: npx c8@10.1.3 --reporter=lcov --reporter=text --report-dir coverage -- npm run test:unit
